title: Collapsible brief cards (HomeBriefs.tsx) — expandedId state, collapsed/expanded sections, chevron rotation, max-h transition
Spacing consistency (both pages) — normalize to 4px grid, gap-6/p-4/gap-2, kill fractional spacing
Typography lockdown (both pages) — enforce exact type scale per spec
Fade-in on data load (both pages) — animate-in fade-in duration-300, staggered card delays
Empty states (both pages) — HomeBriefs empty, ProgramsNew empty/filtered
Skeleton shapes (both pages) — HomeBriefs skeleton, ProgramsNew table row skeleton
Brief priority indicators (HomeBriefs.tsx) — confidence border, amber dot, opacity-70, program badge
Table micro-interactions (ProgramsNew.tsx) — row hover translate, pulse badge, Dialog for delete
Toggle bar to sidebar pill (Layout.tsx) — remove full-width bar, add pill to sidebar
Brief action buttons (HomeBriefs.tsx) — Ask follow-up + View full brief ghost buttons in expanded state
